weekly_events.name: Czwartkowe Karaoke
weekly_events.description: Wieczór karaoke z klubowym klimatem i wspólną zabawą przy ulubionych hitach.

weekly_events.name: Piątkowa impreza
weekly_events.description: Weekendowa impreza taneczna z muzyką klubową i parkietem dla gości.
weekly_events.source: facebook promotional posts inviting guests every Friday

weekly_events.name: Sobota na parkiecie
weekly_events.description: Główna impreza weekendowa z DJ i parkietem tanecznym.
weekly_events.source: facebook promotional posts inviting guests every Saturday

special_events.notes: Special themed parties appear occasionally in social media promotions.

website_usage: Use Karaoke Night as a highlighted weekly event.
Display Friday and Saturday as weekend party nights.
Allow CMS editing of event names in case branding changes.
agent_notes.ui_hint: Events should appear as cards with day, title, and short description.
